title: German Cobblemon Names
description: A resource pack that lets you enjoy German Pokémon names in Cobblemon while keeping your Minecraft interface in English!
body:
# German Cobblemon Names 🇩🇪✨

A lightweight resource pack that replaces Cobblemon’s Pokémon names with their German translations — while keeping your Minecraft interface in English.

This pack is perfect for players who want to enjoy Cobblemon with German Pokémon names without changing their game language.

---

## 🎯 Purpose

Many players prefer playing Minecraft in English but would like Pokémon names in German.  
This resource pack provides exactly that experience by overriding Cobblemon’s language files, ensuring a clean and seamless integration.

No additional configuration required.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🇩🇪 German Pokémon names in Cobblemon  
- 🌍 Keeps Minecraft’s interface language unchanged  
- 🔄 Fully compatible with other resource packs  
- 🛠 No mod file modifications needed  
- ⚡ Simple drag-and-drop installation  

---

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the resource pack  
2. Place it into your `resourcepacks` folder  
3. Enable it in **Options → Resource Packs**  
4. Move it to the active list  
5. Click **Done**

---

## 🤝 Credits

This project was inspired by the original **French Cobblemon Names** resource pack.  
Special thanks to the creators of the French version for the concept and idea.

Additional credits go to the **Cobblemon development team** for creating the base mod and its translation system.
